ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Continued

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Vincent Yu for Ralph Clayton Harrison (Executor).

The Court stated that a petitiion for final distribution or a status report was to be filed. Mr. Yu stated the petition for final distribution was filed today and that the hearing is set for January 16, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. Matter Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Continued To Dec-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu for Ralph Harrison.

Mr. Yu stated that the petition for final distribution is completed, that it is being reviewed by the Client, that he was hoping to have it filed before this hearing and that he would like to have it filed by the end of this month. Mr. Yu also stated that he had to do searches for predeceased relatives, that the accounting was sent to the Client and returned back to them, that it now has been sent back to the Client and that it went out the middle of last week. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to December 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that if the petition for final distribution is not going to be filed, he needs to get the report on status of administration straightened out.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Continued To Nov-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Continued To Oct-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu for Ralph Harrison (Executor).

The Court stated that it has a report and that it is disappointed to find that notice does not include the required language under Probate Code 12201 as Counsel represented at the last hearing. Mr Yu stated that it was an oversight on his part however, he did provide notice on all of the Beneficiaries, that a petition for final distribution was sent out last Friday to his Client for signature and that he will file a declaration as to status of the unknown Beneficiaries. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to October 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Oct-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Continued To Sep-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu for Ralph Harrison (Executor).

The Court noted that a status report was filed on July 28, 2017 with a hearing date of September 5, 2017, but that it did not see a notice of hearing. Mr. You stated that notice has also been filed, that there was a problem with e filing, that he cleared it up and that the notice includes language under Probate Code 12201. The report of status of administration on today's calendar is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Continued To Aug-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu for Ralph Harrison (Executor).

Mr. Yu apologized to the Court stating that he was dealing with a hectic office move and preparing for a trial, that it fell through the cracks, that the executor will be able to handle the work, but at a slower pace and that he intends to file a petition for final distribution in August. Mr. Yu also stated that he will be seeing his Client tomorrow and that he will have him sign the response to the Examiner's notes. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to August 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to respond to Examiner's notes and provide them to the Court before the hearing date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on July 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the accounting has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
